title: AARNAV Bamboo Knitting Needles - 2x35cm, 4mm, Single Pointed, Warm, Arthritic Hands, Bamboo Pins (2x4mm)
features: Pack contains 1 Pair (Two Needles) of AARNAV 2 x 35cm Long 4mm Bamboo Single Pointed Needles.
Needle length = approx 35cm / 13.7 inch, Needle thickness: 4 mm. Size marked on each needle.

IDEAL GIFT FOR KNITTING LOVERS: The all-in-one knit kit includes everything you need to knit; our knitting needles set is suitable for any weave DIY lover or beginner or Professional. Easy To carry wherever you go!

WEAVE YOUR DREAM: Ideal handmade weave DIY tools, such as sweaters, hats, scarves, gloves, socks, shoes, handbags, or other cute handmade gifts, perfect knitting supplies for beginners. This is a special handmade gift for friends or family. The long shaft holds the active stitches of the fabric to prevent them from unraveling, whereas the tapered ends are used to form new stitches.

HIGH-QUALITY MATERIAL: It is made of high-quality Bamboo material, strong and durable, smooth surface, and meticulous workmanship, and will not crack the yarn. Your hands won't get hurt by the knitting needle's ergonomic design. It is a slender, straight stick tapered to a point at the end with a flat knob at the other end to prevent the stitches from slipping off.

QUIET AND LIGHTWEIGHT: These Bamboo knitting needles will not produce a collision sound during use, so there is no need to worry about disturbing others. They are extremely lightweight, reduce pressure on the wrists and fingers, and prevent hand fatigue.
